note: Xero monthly net. Months January through August match QuickBooks within $2 of rounding. September and October are short on the Xero side due to a Square feed break starting September 4 and a Stripe feed gap covering two payouts. See reconciliation_notes.json.

months.memo: Significantly low vs QuickBooks because of the Square feed break and the Stripe gap. Missing: Stripe payout 2026-09-14 net $295.40, Stripe payout 2026-09-28 net $284.70, Square deposit 2026-09-22 net $97.88.
Square feed still not reconnected. Two in-studio drop-in payments and one walk-up class fee from October 3 and October 7 are not in the Xero record.
